title: Executive Order 12023—Central Intelligence Agency Retirement and Disability System

flags.justification: A narrow, technical set of retirement-system administration rules with specific application deadlines.
Precise, specific rules with defined effective dates for each provision.
Multiple related retirement-administration rules all coherently serve one purpose.
A benefits-administration framework, not a compliance regime against third parties.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A standing retirement-system framework, evergreen by nature.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed; Sec. 1(a)'s anti-attachment protection for annuities is a protective feature for beneficiaries.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A narrow, technical retirement-system administrative framework.
No second agency's competing mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.

notes: Validation batch (negative). Structural weight: 0/10 = 0.0%. Notable for its anti-garnishment, anti-attachment protection for retirement annuities — a genuine, protective design feature for beneficiaries.
